topic: AI 辅助学习系统搭建

data.title: Building AI-Assisted Learning Systems
data.summary: Design and implement an intelligent learning system by integrating AI models, educational analytics, and adaptive learning technologies to create personalized educational experiences.
data.description: Design and implement an intelligent learning system by integrating AI models, educational analytics, and adaptive learning technologies to create personalized educational experiences.

nodes.title: AI Foundations and Learning System Architecture
nodes.description: Establish core AI concepts and understand how machine learning and language models support educational applications. Design system architecture for an AI-assisted learning platform.
learning_points: Understand fundamental AI/ML concepts and their educational applications
Design a modular system architecture for AI learning platforms
Set up development environment with essential AI tools and frameworks

sub_nodes.title: AI Fundamentals for Educational Systems
sub_nodes.description: Core concepts of AI and machine learning relevant to educational technology applications.
learning_points: Machine learning basics: supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning
Natural language processing for educational content understanding
Large language models: architecture, capabilities, and limitations
AI evaluation metrics for learning outcomes

sub_nodes.title: System Architecture Design
sub_nodes.description: Planning the technical infrastructure for an AI-powered learning system.
learning_points: Microservices architecture with container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
Integration patterns: API design, model serving, and real-time inference
Data flow design: learning analytics pipeline and feedback loops
Security and privacy considerations in educational data handling

sub_nodes.title: Development Environment Setup
sub_nodes.description: Configuring tools and platforms for building AI learning systems.
learning_points: Local model deployment with Ollama and similar frameworks
API integration with LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models)
Development workflow: version control, testing, and CI/CD for AI applications
Setting up GPU-accelerated development environment

nodes.title: Intelligent Tutoring Components Implementation
nodes.description: Build practical AI components including AI tutors, content generators, and assessment systems. Implement real learning system features with hands-on coding exercises.
learning_points: Implement AI-powered tutoring interfaces with conversation capabilities
Build automatic assessment and feedback mechanisms
Create adaptive content generation tailored to learner needs

sub_nodes.title: Building AI Tutoring Agents
sub_nodes.description: Construct conversational AI agents that serve as learning assistants.
learning_points: Multi-turn conversation design for educational interactions
Context management and memory systems for personalized tutoring
Tool use and retrieval-augmented generation for accurate responses
Evaluating tutoring effectiveness and conversation quality

sub_nodes.title: Automated Assessment and Feedback Systems
sub_nodes.description: Implement AI-driven evaluation of learner work with intelligent feedback generation.
learning_points: Semantic similarity and rubric-based evaluation approaches
Generating constructive feedback with actionable recommendations
Formative assessment design for continuous learning support
Handling subjective and creative assignments with AI assistance

sub_nodes.title: Adaptive Content Generation
sub_nodes.description: Creating personalized learning materials based on learner profiles and performance.
learning_points: Prompt engineering for educational content creation
Fine-tuning models on specific subject domains
Generating practice problems and explanations at varying difficulty levels
Ensuring content accuracy and avoiding hallucination in educational contexts

nodes.title: Learning Analytics and Personalization Engine
nodes.description: Understand learning analytics principles and build systems for tracking progress and personalizing learning paths. Implement recommendation algorithms for adaptive learning.
learning_points: Design learning analytics pipelines for capturing learner interactions
Implement personalization algorithms based on learner behavior and performance
Build dashboards for visualizing learning progress and insights

sub_nodes.title: Learning Data Collection and Analysis
sub_nodes.description: Methods for capturing and analyzing learning interaction data.
learning_points: Learning activity logging: video watches, quiz attempts, time spent
Learner modeling: knowledge state estimation and skill tracking
Cohort analysis and comparative learning pattern identification
Ethical considerations in learning data collection

sub_nodes.title: Personalization and Recommendation Systems
sub_nodes.description: Algorithms for customizing learning experiences to individual needs.
learning_points: Knowledge graph-based learning path recommendations
Spaced repetition and adaptive review scheduling
Difficulty adjustment based on learner performance patterns
Content difficulty and format personalization strategies

sub_nodes.title: Progress Tracking and Analytics Dashboard
sub_nodes.description: Building visualization systems for monitoring learner progress.
learning_points: Real-time progress indicators and milestone tracking
Performance analytics: strengths, weaknesses, and improvement areas
Predictive models for identifying at-risk learners
Designing effective learning analytics visualizations

nodes.title: Production Deployment and System Integration
nodes.description: Deploy the AI learning system to production environments. Integrate all components into a unified platform and ensure system reliability.
learning_points: Deploy AI learning applications with proper infrastructure
Integrate multiple AI components into a cohesive learning platform
Implement monitoring, scaling, and maintenance procedures

sub_nodes.title: Production Deployment Strategies
sub_nodes.description: Moving AI learning systems from development to production.
learning_points: Containerized deployment with Kubernetes for scalability
Model serving infrastructure: batch and real-time inference
Load balancing and caching strategies for AI applications
Cost optimization for LLM API usage and model hosting

sub_nodes.title: Platform Integration and APIs
sub_nodes.description: Unifying all components into a complete learning platform.
learning_points: Frontend-backend integration with REST and GraphQL APIs
User authentication and role-based access for educational contexts
Third-party LMS integration (Moodle, Canvas, custom platforms)
Cross-platform compatibility: web, mobile, and desktop access

sub_nodes.title: Monitoring, Optimization, and Maintenance
sub_nodes.description: Ensuring reliable operation and continuous improvement of deployed systems.
learning_points: System health monitoring and alerting for AI service reliability
A/B testing frameworks for evaluating learning system improvements
User feedback loops and iterative design processes
Version management and model updates in production

nodes.title: Capstone: Complete AI Learning System Project
nodes.description: Apply all learned concepts by designing and implementing a complete AI-assisted learning system. Include planning, development, deployment, and evaluation phases.
learning_points: Design a complete AI-assisted learning system for a specific educational domain
Implement and deploy a functional prototype with all core components
Evaluate system effectiveness and present recommendations for improvement

sub_nodes.title: System Design and Planning
sub_nodes.description: Defining the scope, architecture, and implementation plan for the capstone project.
learning_points: Problem definition: identifying target learners and educational goals
Technical stack selection based on requirements and constraints
Component design with clear interfaces and data flow
Project timeline and milestone planning

sub_nodes.title: Implementation and Deployment
sub_nodes.description: Building and deploying the complete AI learning system.
learning_points: Agile development with iterative feature implementation
Integration testing across all system components
Production deployment with monitoring and logging
Documentation and user guide preparation

sub_nodes.title: Evaluation and Presentation
sub_nodes.description: Assessing system performance and presenting the completed project.
learning_points: Learning outcome measurement and effectiveness analysis
User experience evaluation through testing and feedback
Performance benchmarking and optimization recommendations
Final presentation with system demonstration and documentation

data._input_query: AI 辅助学习系统搭建
